scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @inkio/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @inkio/essential typecheck && pnpm --filter @inkio/advanced typecheck && pnpm --filter @inkio/simple typecheck && pnpm --filter @inkio/editor typecheck && pnpm --filter @inkio/image-editor typecheck && pnpm --filter docs typecheck && pnpm --filter example-basic-react typecheck && pnpm --filter example-next-app-router typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm examples:build && pnpm e2e && pnpm release:smoke
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @inkio/core build && pnpm --filter @inkio/essential build && pnpm --filter @inkio/advanced build && pnpm --filter @inkio/simple build && pnpm --filter @inkio/editor build && pnpm --filter @inkio/image-editor build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @inkio/core test && pnpm --filter @inkio/essential test && pnpm --filter @inkio/advanced test && pnpm --filter @inkio/simple test && pnpm --filter @inkio/editor test && pnpm --filter @inkio/image-editor test
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm publish:core && pnpm publish:essential && pnpm publish:advanced && pnpm publish:simple && pnpm publish:editor && pnpm publish:image-editor
